full_text:
We are now recruiting top Applied Research Interns to join Conversational AI team in Yerevan! Our team develops new deep learning models and algorithms for speech and language processing. Do you love the challenge of training large deep learning models? If so, join our team!
We are looking for candidates who can commit to a 6 months long, full-time internship.
What you'll be doing:
Design and train new models for speech and natural language
Build new speech datasets
Create new tools for speech and natural language processing
Develop novel deep learning algorithms
Contribute to NeMo - Conversational AI framework
What we need to see:
Students pursuing a Master or PhD in Computer Science or Electrical Engineering
Excellent Python programming skills
Strong knowledge in Deep Learning for Speech or Natural Language Processing
Hands-on Experience with PyTorch
Ability to work independently
With highly competitive salaries and a comprehensive benefits package, Nvidia is widely considered to be one of the technology industry's most desirable employers. We have some of the most brilliant and talented people in the world working with us and our engineering teams are growing fast in some of the hottest innovative fields: Deep Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and Large Language Models.

location: Poland, Warsaw, Hungary, Budapest, Armenia, Yerevan
full_text:
NVIDIA has been transforming computer graphics, PC gaming, and accelerated computing for more than 25 years. It’s a unique legacy of innovation that’s fueled by great technology—and amazing people. Today, we’re tapping into the unlimited potential of AI to define the next era of computing. An era in which our GPU acts as the brains of computers, robots, and self-driving cars that can understand the world. Doing what’s never been done before takes vision, innovation, and the world’s best talent. As an NVIDIAN, you’ll be immersed in a diverse, supportive environment where everyone is inspired to do their best work. Come join the team and see how you can make a lasting impact on the world.
We are now looking for Senior Data Engineer to become a member of Data Platform Team to work on a multi-cluster multi-cloud set of engineering and customer engagement APIs. We serve an audience of more than 200M users with rich targeting and segmentation capabilities. Join us to support this development!
What you will be doing:
Design various RESTful APIs and backend databases in multi region environment.
Contribute into targeting engine and segmentation pipelines.
Develop automations and tests to ensure system stability.
Collaborate with various Engineering and Business teams on their needs.
Drive innovation in Data Platform architecture and software stack.
What we need to see:
A Bachelor's or Master's degree in a Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent, and 6+ years of experience.
Expert knowledge of Java and Springboot.
Hands on skills in Relational/NoSQL database technologies.
Strong understanding of distributed systems architecture.
Proficient in English.
Ways to stand out from the crowd:
Knowledge of either Cassandra, Clickhouse or Postgres and ability to build solutions based on it.
Past experience with Kubernetes and AWS.
Creative and autonomous with a genuinely real passion for the modern technologies is highly desired.
NVIDIA is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.
Widely considered to be one of the technology world’s most desirable employers, NVIDIA offers highly competitive salaries and a comprehensive benefits package. As you plan your future, see what we can offer to you and your family www.nvidiabenefits.com/
Your base salary will be determined based on your location, experience, and the pay of employees in similar positions. For Poland: The base salary range is 221,250 PLN - 383,500 PLN for Level 3, and 292,500 PLN - 507,000 PLN for Level 4.

location: Remote - Poland, Poland, Warsaw, Remote - Armenia, Armenia, Yerevan

full_text:
NVIDIA's technology is at the heart of AI revolution, touching people across the planet by powering everything from self-driving cars, robotics, and voice-powered intelligent assistants! Join a diverse applied research team that is building a next generation of Conversational AI systems.
We work on new language models for code and mathematics reasoning. Our team crafted the math reasoning model which won the latest Kaggle  AI MO competition. We also develop algorithms to accelerate training large models on our GPU cloud. We release new models as part of NeMo - open-source toolkit for Conversational AI used by many companies for such applications as customer service, voice assistants, etc. We collaborate with research and product teams, as well as researchers from top academic machine learning labs.
What you'll be doing:
Develop new Deep Learning models for on new language models for code and mathematics reasoning,
Design new large scale training algorithm
Open-source models using NeMo conversational AI frameworks
Mentor interns
Publish research papers on top AI conferences
Collaborate with universities and research teams.
What we need to see:
PhD in Computer Science or Electrical Engineering with specialization in  Deep Learning
2+ years of research experience in Deep Learning theory  and applications
Excellent Python programming skills
Experience with PyTorch
Strong publications record in Deep Learning
Ways to stand out from the crowd:
Contribution to open-source projects
Being reviewers for one of the top speech conferences
NVIDIA is at the forefront of breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence, High-Performance Computing, and Visualization. Our teams are composed of driven, innovative professionals dedicated to pushing the boundaries of technology. We offer highly competitive salaries, an extensive benefits package, and a work environment that promotes diversity, inclusion, and flexibility. As an equal opportunity employer, we are committed to fostering a supportive and empowering workplace for all
